channel.title: When I create a project it stucks on "installing dependencies"
channel.description:
When I create a project it stucks on "installing dependencies". I installed the node js again to check if it's causing the issue. But still facing this problem. Can anyone help me with it?
? Pick a starter theme to clone: @frontity/mars-theme (recommended) √ Creating README.md. √ Creating package.json. √ Creating frontity.settings.js. √ Cloning @frontity/mars-theme. | Installing dependencies...

item.title: When I create a project it stucks on "installing dependencies"
item.dc:creator: krishna.oepl
item.description:
When I create a project it stucks on “installing dependencies”. I installed the node js again to check if it’s causing the issue. But still facing this problem.
Can anyone help me with it?

? Pick a starter theme to clone: @frontity/mars-theme (recommended)
√ Creating README.md.
√ Creating package.json.
√ Creating frontity.settings.js.
√ Cloning @frontity/mars-theme.
| Installing dependencies…

Read full topic
item.source: When I create a project it stucks on "installing dependencies"
